mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.priority, t.assignee_id, t.creator_id, t.due_date, t.tags, t.created_at, t.updated_at, ua.name AS assignee_name, uc.name AS creator_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN users ua ON t.assignee_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN users uc ON t.creator_id = uc.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
